title: Supply the production-tested Glean bootstrap prompt text
description: ADR-P6-007 builds the seeding phase around the bootstrap prompt that was tested in production via Glean (the worked example proves the output quality). The prompt TEXT itself was not provided — only its output. The design reverse-engineers the structural contract from the worked example (numbered '## N. Title' sections, Confirmed/Derived/Unknown claim labels, 'Open Questions / Assumptions to Validate', closing 'How My AI Assistant Should Support Me'), and templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md will carry a reconstruction until the real text lands. Please paste the exact production prompt so the template ships the tested version verbatim (with the user-name placeholder added).
resolution: Production prompt text supplied by the user on 2026-07-05 and captured verbatim (formatting normalised, wording unchanged) at templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md. The template carries: a Personal OS wrapper directing the assistant to write context/profile.md, the master prompt with [FULL_NAME]/[WORK_EMAIL] placeholders, the recommended output structure, and the follow-up first-person conversion prompt (folded into the lock-in step, ADR-P6-007/story 011). Story 009's reconstruction-marker AC replaced with a production-text AC.
